texto: There is no road too long to the man who advances deliberately and without undue haste
autor: there are no honors too distant to the man who prepares himself for them with patience.
explicacao: Citação de there are no honors too distant to the man who prepares himself for them with patience. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There is no road too long to the man who advances deliberately and without undue haste” articula reflexao, jean-de-la-bruyere, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
